target_area.description: Method Section 3.2 Evidence Gates closing sentence before the Claim Registry and Results transition

change_summary: Replaced the longer 'summarizes the allowed claim boundary for each gate' sentence with 'names each gate's permitted claim'.
Removed a visual column-break orphan where 'claim bound-' ended the left column and 'ary for each gate.' opened the right column.
Kept the claim-boundary semantics intact while making the Evidence Gates close read more like an ACL method transition.

observations: Before: page 4 left column ended with 'Table 1 summarizes the allowed claim bound-' and the right column opened with 'ary for each gate.'.
After: page 4 left column ends with the complete sentence 'Table 1 names each gate's permitted claim.'.
The Claim Registry heading and Results transition remain readable after the local compaction.
